name: Waifu-inator Rpg
description:
Well congratulations buddy you just got the Waifu-inator!

Now what it does is shoot whatever you want and it becomes a waifu!

Your couch your desk your water bottle phone bed even your best friend if you wanna...

Ayo pause

Anyway just DON’T shoot yourself

Also took this from character Ai I loved it and wanted to preserve it
creator: Psychlock
